title: Mentoring Programs * LGBTQ2+ Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Mentoring Programs * LGBTQ2+ Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disabilities Issues Homeless Youth LGBTQ2+ Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BASIC RIGHTS OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Builds and supports political policies that promote equality for lesbian, gay, bisexual, and transgender Oregonians. Provides various services including information and referral to legal services, youth mentorship programs, education and outreach to the business community, political advocacy, and offers volunteer opportunities. Eligibility: Individuals with interest in LGBTQ2+ issues Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 222-6151 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
